predicates.name: is_last_closed_financial_year
predicates.description: The financial year is the company's last closed financial year.

predicates.name: employee_threshold_exceeded
predicates.description: The company exceeds the employee-count threshold in the financial year.

predicates.name: net_turnover_threshold_exceeded
predicates.description: The company exceeds the annual net turnover excluding VAT threshold in the financial year.

predicates.name: balance_sheet_total_threshold_exceeded
predicates.description: The company exceeds the balance sheet total threshold in the financial year.

predicates.name: more_than_one_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The company exceeds more than one of the listed size criteria in the financial year.

predicates.name: at_most_one_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The company exceeds no more than one of the listed size criteria in the financial year.

predicates.name: is_small_company
predicates.description: The company qualifies as a small company for the relevant financial year.

functions.name: annual_average_employees
functions.description: The annual average number of employees of the company in the financial year.

functions.name: annual_net_turnover_excluding_vat
functions.description: The company's annual net turnover excluding VAT in the financial year.

functions.name: balance_sheet_total
functions.description: The company's balance sheet total in the financial year.
